connection: Shared datastore and API connection definitions
data-object: Logical datasets (source and staging) with optional data items
code: Generated runtime code (Airflow DAGs, event services)
code/airflow: Airflow DAGs and related generated orchestration
code/airflow/dags: DAG definitions mounted into the Airflow container
extractor_and_poller: Python extractor and poller driven by mapping JSON
infra: Docker Compose for Airflow and Kafka (BasNAS PoC runtime)
infra/airflow: Airflow standalone Compose stack (mounts code/airflow/dags from repo)
template: Handlebars templates for ADL code generation
